mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SCHEDULE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SCHEDULE (SCHEDULE_ID, USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, START_TIME, END_TIME, CLIENT_ID, CLIENT_NAME, COLOR, ALL_DAY) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), #{clientId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{allDay, jdbcType=CHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, START_TIME = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), END_TIME = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), CLIENT_NAME = #{clientName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COLOR = #{color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ALL_DAY = #{allDay, jdbcType=CHAR} WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
